mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (order_no, user_id, product_id, total_price, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{totalPrice}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, p.name as product_name, p.image_url as product_image, p.price as product_price, p.user_id as seller_id FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT o.*, p.name as product_name, p.image_url as product_image, p.price as product_price FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.*, p.name as product_name, p.image_url as product_image, p.price as product_price, u.nickname as buyer_nickname FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.*, p.name as product_name, p.image_url as product_image, p.price as product_price, u.nickname as buyer_nickname FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) FROM t_order WHERE status = 1
